speaker: seller

args.message: Well-equipped 2016 Tahoe LT with leather seating, Bose audio, and third-row capability — perfect for the active family! This full-size SUV has been dealer-serviced and runs strong with the proven 5.3L V8. Ready for your next adventure.

speaker: buyer

args.message: Can you tell me if this Tahoe has been in any accidents or if there are any known issues?

text: Can you tell me if this Tahoe has been in any accidents or if there are any known issues?

speaker: seller

args.message: This Tahoe? Solid as a rock! Clean CarFax, no accidents, and runs like a dream. We just had our top mechanic give it a once-over, and he gave it a clean bill of health. You're looking at a real gem here, ready to hit the road!

text: This Tahoe? Solid as a rock! Clean CarFax, no accidents, and runs like a dream. We just had our top mechanic give it a once-over, and he gave it a clean bill of health. You're looking at a real gem here, ready to hit the road!

speaker: buyer

args.message: What kind of maintenance has been done recently? Any major repairs or services?

text: What kind of maintenance has been done recently? Any major repairs or services?

speaker: seller

args.message: Oh, it's been meticulously maintained. We've got service records showing regular oil changes and tune-ups. Actually, I recall the previous owner just had the brakes done a few months back – good as new! You won't have to worry about a thing with this one.

text: Oh, it's been meticulously maintained. We've got service records showing regular oil changes and tune-ups. Actually, I recall the previous owner just had the brakes done a few months back – good as new! You won't have to worry about a thing with this one.

speaker: buyer

args.message: Given the mileage and condition, I'm willing to offer $22,000.

text: Given the mileage and condition, I'm willing to offer $22,000.

speaker: seller

args.message: That's a decent start, I appreciate you coming in! However, for a Tahoe LT in this condition with all the features, $24,000 is a much fairer price. I've seen similar models go for even more at auction last week. This one is priced to move, but I can't quite go down to $22,000 just yet. How about we meet in the middle at $23,000?

args.reason: I appreciate the offer, but $23,000 is still above my budget. I'll have to walk away for now.
